summary: Fixed setProjectItemStatus return value handling in cron.mjs — all three status transitions (in-progress, done, revert-to-ready) now log a warning instead of silently discarding failures, preventing silent infinite re-run loops and stuck 'In Progress' items. Fixed doctor.mjs to split the board-warning into two distinct messages: 'field IDs not set' (missing base config) vs 'Ready column not set up — required for agt cron-tick' (cron-specific gap), scoping the warning appropriately. Added 2 tests covering the new behaviors.
